title: rubus adenophloeus
intro: Rubus adenophloeus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of bramble native to the Himalayan Mountains. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus adenophloeus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Rubus adenophloeus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
